identity.name: Mihail Petkov
identity.headline: Engineering systems that prove what they actually did.
identity.bio: Building proof-native autonomous systems, local-first AI infrastructure, mobility platforms, blockchain architecture, and instrument-grade products.

current.mission: Rust control plane, verified autonomous execution, and model orchestration

systems.name: MAYA Codex Nexus
systems.summary: Local-first autonomous engineering workstation with proof-native execution, specialist agents, transactional workspaces, model routing, and runtime receipts.

systems.name: Vozime
systems.summary: Rider-and-driver mobile platform with role-aware navigation, trip lifecycle state, maps, realtime feedback, trusted notifications, and a premium mobile design system.

systems.name: AURELIS
systems.summary: Deterministic realtime presentation engine with velocity-driven motion, synchronized audio and haptics, pooled effects, responsive interaction, and runtime performance gates.

systems.name: DERAMA Studio
systems.summary: Professional audio-workstation architecture spanning playlist, channel rack, piano roll, mixer, automation, synthesis, sampling, editing, and native JUCE DSP.

systems.name: AETHER RF Sense
systems.summary: Real-input-only Wi-Fi telemetry research exploring movement inference, resilient acquisition, operator-visible calibration, confidence, and realtime signal visualization.

systems.name: CredTrace Local Recovery Console
systems.summary: Bounded local recovery console with recursive scanning, browser-profile intelligence, archive inspection, resumable execution, redacted findings, and persistent evidence.

systems.name: UI_DEBUG_MCP_PRO
systems.summary: Fail-closed UI quality automation for browser exceptions, authentication failures, accessibility audits, runtime diagnostics, visual evidence, and CI receipts.

systems.name: Aether Audio Lab
systems.summary: Native audio research spanning three-dimensional reverb, modulation, advanced synthesis, realtime visualization, and instrument-grade control surfaces.

systems.name: Blockchain Systems Lab
systems.summary: Research track for cryptographic receipts, smart-contract safety, verifiable automation, event-sourced ledgers, zero-knowledge architecture, and disciplined on-chain/off-chain boundaries.

caseStudies.name: MAYA Codex Nexus
caseStudies.problem: Autonomous developer tools often claim success without preserving causal evidence.
caseStudies.system: A local-first desktop runtime that binds intent, cognition projection, isolated action, workspace mutation, verification, and receipts into one event-sourced continuum.

caseStudies.name: Vozime
caseStudies.problem: Mobility applications become confusing when rider, driver, map, payment, and trip state diverge.
caseStudies.system: A role-aware mobile state architecture with deterministic trip lifecycle, responsive map context, trustworthy notifications, and platform-native interaction discipline.

caseStudies.name: DERAMA Studio
caseStudies.problem: Audio tools lose creative speed when routing, editing, pattern, timeline, and DSP models are fragmented.
caseStudies.system: A native workstation architecture aligning channel, pattern, playlist, editor, mixer, automation, and DSP state while preserving low-latency interaction.

caseStudies.name: Blockchain Systems Lab
caseStudies.problem: Distributed systems are often presented as immutable without exposing verification boundaries.
caseStudies.system: A research architecture that treats cryptographic hashes, execution receipts, contract policy, and on-chain/off-chain state transitions as inspectable proof objects.
